body:
I laugh at the tickle as you kiss my side…

A few minutes ago you lead me into the bedroom, blindfolded, wearing nothing but a satin sleep mask you told me to put over my eyes. Once you lay me down, you say, “Don’t move!” I listen.

I hear you do something with the lights and there is definitely something different in the light peeking under the mask. But then you begin to kiss. It feels like you are attempting to kiss every inch of me you can reach. And I squirm and laugh and gasp and sigh, I do my best to stay, but on you continue, kisses, pause, click, kisses, pause, click, kisses…again and again and again.

Finally you say, “Close your eyes and I’ll remove the mask.” I continue to do as I’m told. And after a few moments, you tell me to open and I my eyes widen to see myself reflected in the mirror above me, lit in the blacklight, and there all across my body are your lip marks…all over I am glowing with your kisses…
